headline: Is NXP (NXPI) Quietly Rewriting Its Edge AI Strategy With The Peridio Partnership?
summary: In March 2026, Peridio announced it had joined the NXP Semiconductors Partner Program as a Registered Partner, deepening collaboration around NXP’s i.MX applications processors and Ara discrete neural processing units for edge AI devices. This partnership highlights how NXP’s AI-focused silicon is being paired with production-grade software infrastructure and security tooling to help manufacturers accelerate development and regulatory readiness for connected, AI-enabled hardware. Next, we’ll...

headline: Booking Holdings Board And Pet Travel Moves Highlight Valuation Talking Point
summary: Booking Holdings (NasdaqGS:BKNG) has appointed Kurt Sievers, former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its board of directors. Caroline Sullivan has been named Chief Accounting Officer and Controller, expanding the senior finance leadership bench. The company has entered into a new partnership with DogPack to streamline digital pet friendly travel offerings for users. Booking Holdings, the parent of major online travel brands, sits at the center of how consumers plan and book trips across...

headline: We Saw the Quantum Threat Before the Headlines Did
summary: Earlier this week, during our Masters in Trading Live sessions, we walked through an emerging collision that almost nobody in the trading world is paying attention to yet: quantum computing versus cryptocurrency security. Before this revelation, the idea felt speculative – a thought experiment lodged somewhere between cutting-edge science and market irrelevance. The kind of thing most traders would scroll past without a second thought. Then reality caught up. A 57-page white paper from Google’s
